title: Crystal Ice Cream
description: Adds 4 new ice creams which give you a negative effect while giving you a positive effect for longer
body:
# Adds 4 new Ice Creams based off of 4 crystals

## Ice Cream Cone
- Just a retexture of bread but required for each ice cream, crafted with 3 wheat 1 sugar and 1 diamond
## Emerald Ice Cream
- Gives Poison IV for 10 seconds and Village Hero for 10 minutes
> - Gives 5 hunger and 5.5 saturation (this is the same for each ice cream)
## Gold Ice Cream
- Gives Batrachotoxin for 10 seconds and Haste III for 1 minute
## Diamond Ice Cream 
- Gives Comatose for 10 seconds and Resistance I for 30 seconds
## Amethyst Ice Cream
- Gives Regeneration I for 1 minute and definitely doesnt give you Budding for 2 minutes (trust)
